title: Warm up
content: The slide features images of three cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, seen from inside a car. Each image shows a distinct scene representing a unique aspect of the city's environment.

title: AN EVOLVING NATION
content: The slide highlights the concept of China as an evolving nation through the lens of its cities and taxi services. It features images representing taxis and urban landscapes of Chinese cities.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This slide introduces an investigative session focusing on city development. It outlines a process involving local features, development strategies, and positive impact outcomes.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide discusses development strategies for Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, linking each city to a specific approach. Beijing focuses on integrating technology and tradition, Chongqing on sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou on tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers…
content: The slide presents development strategies through the perspective of taxi drivers in different Chinese cities. It emphasizes the unique development strategies adopted by each city according to their local features to promote growth.
